title: Input Reading, Tokenization, Command Registry, and Dispatch · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs input reading, tokenization, command registry, and dispatch from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for deterministic command parser and injected dispatcher after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Choose bufio.Reader or Scanner from line-size, token, error, cancellation, and testability requirements and configure any explicit limit.
Normalize line endings and whitespace under a documented grammar without corrupting names or silently accepting extra arguments.
Validate required, optional, repeated, missing, and extra arguments before handler access and return actionable usage.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Pokedex Go Dispatch E…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 8534 during a narrow-terminal ranger workflow. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile line admission, argument validation, registry lookup, and deterministic dispatch; failed and canceled commands must preserve the prior admitted state; then inject one redirect, control sequence, file, timeout, or persistence failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test blank, known, aliased, unknown, malformed, EOF, and read-error cases with injected streams and exact outputs.

Inspect the Pokedex Go Dispatch Evidence trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Write the review evidence note for Pokedex Go Dispatch Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Go team handles case 8181 during a clean cross-platform package smoke. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile line admission, argument validation, registry lookup, and deterministic dispatch; the fixed PokéAPI origin and fair-use traffic budget must remain enforced; then change one catch, owned record, encounter relation, or history state and prove the prior invariant. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.
